assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Cloudinary account, obtain product-environment credentials, and complete one official SDK quick start to a demonstrated media-delivery result.

first_success.outcome: A selected official SDK quick start runs end to end and shows its documented media output.
first_success.observable_signal: For a reconstructed Node.js candidate, the script logs configuration and media responses and the transformed image is viewable.

route_selection.surface: Cloudinary Developer Kickstart and SDK quick start
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Email registration then Node.js backend SDK quick start
candidates.reason: Multiple backend, frontend, and mobile SDKs are peer routes to different first media outputs.

candidates.name: Alternate official SDK language quick start
candidates.reason: Consequential tie across SDK languages for the same Kickstart outcome family.

required_path.observable_result: A product environment and credentials are available.

required_path.action: Locate cloud name and API credentials for the product environment.

required_fields.label: Cloud name and API key or secret values

required_path.observable_result: Credentials required by the SDK sample are known.

required_path.action: Run one official SDK quick start through its documented media output.
required_path.observable_result: Documented media delivery or transformation output is observed.

prerequisites.description: A Cloudinary account and product-environment credentials are required.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email verification when using email registration.

platform_outcomes.description: Cloudinary serves transformed or delivered media for the sample.

excluded.item: Optional Kickstart deep-dive tasks beyond the first SDK terminal
excluded.reason: Kickstart presents additional optional onboarding depth.

uncertainties.question: Which backend, frontend, or mobile SDK and language should represent Cloudinary's universal first mile?
uncertainties.impact: SDK choice changes required install and code steps.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Explicit selection of one SDK quick start plus a fresh-account run to its documented terminal.

uncertainties.question: What exact email registration and verification fields appear today?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account signup capture through credential visibility.
